A [[Red supergiant/Legends|red supergiant]], '''Carconth''' was five hundred times as large and a hundred thousand times as bright as [[Coruscant Prime/Legends|Coruscant Prime]], making it the second-largest and seventh-brightest of the known [[Star/Legends|stars]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. At the time of the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], the [[Astrographic Survey Institute]] and its predecessors had been maintaining [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] watch at Carconth for more than six hundred years. Carconth was the site of [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] [[Anomaly 1033]], theorised to be something left behind by a past alien expedition to Carconth.
